## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature / experiment
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Config or dependency change

## Protection checklist

- [ ] I did not commit private datasets, credentials, API keys, or local environment files.
- [ ] I did not commit large model weights or experiment outputs.
- [ ] I checked that the change is limited to the intended files.
- [ ] I updated documentation if behavior, setup, or usage changed.
- [ ] I ran a basic syntax/import check when code was changed.

## Notes for reviewer

Mention any risk, known limitation, or follow-up work here.
